message:
security: add auth hook, remove x-action bypass, sanitize error responses

- Add `authenticate` callback to HandlerOptions — runs before any
  routing so deployers can enforce auth (token, session, etc.)
- Remove x-action header routing override in Workspace.fetch() —
  it allowed bypassing URL-based access controls by overriding the
  action via a request header
- Sanitize 500 error responses to return "Internal server error"
  instead of raw error messages that could leak internal details
  (R2 endpoints, SQL errors, stack traces)
- Remove x-action from CORS allowed headers
